heading: Up and running in minutes
subheading: Three simple steps to streamline your HR operations.

signup.title: Sign up in minutes
signup.description: Create your account in under 2 minutes. No credit card needed, no complex setup. Start working immediately.

import.title: Add your employees
import.description: Add your team members to the employee directory one by one or in bulk. Set up profiles with job titles, departments, and contact details.

manage.title: Manage your HR
manage.description: Track employee records, calculate salaries with Bulgarian tax rates, and use compliance tools -- all from one dashboard.
